name: @sweetpad/lib
description: Internal — do not use. Rust resolver for Xcode build settings, exposed to Node via N-API for the SweetPad VS Code extension.

scripts.build: napi build --platform --release --no-default-features --features node && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:debug: napi build --platform --no-default-features --features node && npm run build:cli:debug
scripts.build:universal: napi build --platform --release --no-default-features --features node --target aarch64-apple-darwin && napi build --platform --release --no-default-features --features node --target x86_64-apple-darwin && napi universalize && npm run build:cli:universal
scripts.build:addon:universal: napi build --platform --release --no-default-features --features node --target aarch64-apple-darwin && napi build --platform --release --no-default-features --features node --target x86_64-apple-darwin && napi universalize
scripts.build:cli: bash vendor/injection-client/build.sh && cargo build --release --bin sweetpad && cp target/release/sweetpad sweetpad-cli
scripts.build:cli:debug: cargo build --bin sweetpad && cp target/debug/sweetpad sweetpad-cli
scripts.build:cli:universal: bash vendor/injection-client/build.sh && cargo build --release --bin sweetpad --target aarch64-apple-darwin && cargo build --release --bin sweetpad --target x86_64-apple-darwin && lipo -create -output sweetpad-cli target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/sweetpad target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/sweetpad
